name: Milky Way Brownies
recipeIngredient: 4 Milky Way candy bars (2.23 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the butter and sliced Milky Way bars in a medium saucepan over low heat until smooth.
2. If necessary, use a wire whisk to blend everything together.
3. Remove from heat and stir in sugar and vanilla.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Mix in flour blended with baking powder and salt.
6. Spread the mixture into a greased square dish.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
8. Allow to cool, then cut into squares. Dust with powdered sugar if desired.
